title: Orchard Toys Big Wheels Jigsaw Puzzle, A Collection of 4 puzzles featuring 4 and 8 pieces ideal for Little Hands, Perfect for Age 3+
features: 8 extra play pieces to add to play value
Each puzzle has just 4 or 8 pieces
Award winning puzzle for children aged 3 and over
description: From the manufacturer Big Wheels Jigsaw Puzzle These colourful puzzles include a variety of construction-themed vehicles including three diggers and a cement mixer. Features chunky, wipe clean pieces that are perfect for little hands to hold, Big Wheels is a fantastic introduction to jigsaw puzzles! Educational Benefits Encourages Discussion Big Wheels can be used as a way to encourage discussion from little learners as they point out their favourite machine± Encourages Imaginative Play The jigsaw also includes 8 extra play pieces for added value and to encourage imaginative role play. Develops Hand Eye Coordination Skills In constructing the puzzles children will be attempting to replicate an image. As they grip the pieces of the puzzle they will be coordinating small muscles, which helps to develop hand eye coordination. About Orchard Toys Orchard Toys have been making educational games and jigsaws in Britain for over 40 years. The emphasis is on ‘learning made fun’, meaning parents can benefit from our trusted educational values whilst children will have so much fun they’ll want to play time and time again! All of our games and jigsaws are made from 100% recycled board and sustainable cardboard, with sturdy, wipe-clean cards and pieces. This means that Orchard Toys products will stand the test of time against constant playing, wear and tear and messy hands.
